versions.version_description: Chords and text throughout the whole song and easier to use.

Accents have been added to enhance the base and 7th notes Played in D as it was initially played makes the A with thumb over on the base E string in the F# position easier. I was unable to work the strum arrows so it goes dud.ddd/ dud.d.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]                      [ch]G6[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
When your legs don't work like they used to before[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]              [ch]G6[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
And I can't sweep you off of your feet[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]                      [ch]G6[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Will your mouth still remember the taste of my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]              [ch]G6[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Will your eyes still smile from your cheeks[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Darlin' I will[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G6[/ch]
Be lovin' you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]G6[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Till we're seventy[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Baby my heart[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Could still fall as hard[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]G6[/ch]
At twenty three[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I'm thinkin' bout how[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]F#m/E[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
People fall in love in mysterious ways[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Maybe just a touch of a hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]F#m/E[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Me I fall in love with you every single day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A7[/ch]
I just wanna tell you I am[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
So honey now[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Take me into your lovin' arms[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                              [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Kiss me under the light of a thousand stars[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Dsus4[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Place your head on my beating heart[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
I'm thinking out loud[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Maybe we found love right where we are[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]                      [ch]G6[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
 When my hairs all but gone and my memory fades[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]                      [ch]G6[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
 And the crowds dont remember my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]                [ch]G6[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
 When my hands don't play the strings the same way (mmm)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]                      [ch]G6[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I know you will still love me the same[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]
'Cause honey your soul[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Can never grow old[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]G6[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
It's evergreen[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Baby your smile's forever in my mind and memory[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I'm thinkin' bout how[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]F#m/E[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
People fall in love in mysterious ways[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Maybe it's all part of a plan[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]F#m/E[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, I'll just keep on making the same mistakes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A7[/ch]
Hoping that you'll understand[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
That baby now (oooooh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Take me into your lovin' arms[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                              [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Kiss me under the light of a thousand stars[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Dsus4[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Place your head on my beating heart[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
I'm thinking out loud[/tab]

Maybe we found love right where we are[/tab]

(la la la la la la la la la)

That baby now [/tab]
